name: Corem Property Group AB (publ)
summary: Corem Property Group AB (publ), a real estate company, owns, manages, and develops industrial, warehouse, logistics, and retail properties in central and southern Sweden and Denmark. As of December 31, 2020, it had 167 properties with a leasable area of 9,85,887 square meters. Corem Property Group AB (publ) was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
